# t4o_workload_policy (Resource)

Manages a reusable TrilioVault workload policy (shared backup schedule).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Policy name.

### Optional

- `assigned_projects` (List of String) Project UUIDs to assign this policy to.
- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `jobschedule` (Attributes) Backup schedule for this policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--jobschedule))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Policy UUID.

<a id="nestedatt--jobschedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jobschedule`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean)

Optional:

- `end_date` (String)
- `fullbackup_interval` (Number)
- `interval` (String)
- `retention_days` (Number)
- `snapshots_to_retain` (Number)
- `start_date` (String)
